_doc: Tooltip panel pixel regions in MCP screenshot coordinate space, calibrated against the reference window below. See docs/self_healing_loop_design.md#research for the capture sequence that consumes these.
_build: Into the Breach AE (Steam, macOS native, Max Board Scale 5x)

name_tag.description: Unit name + HP/move icons. Appears on selection of any mech or enemy. Smallest crop — good for Vision unit-ID.

unit_status.description: For enemies: large portrait. For mechs: weapon rail (portrait slot + up to 2 weapon icons). Appears on selection.

weapon_preview.description: Tall panel showing weapon name, class, description, rendered mini-board with AOE/push arrows, damage, upgrade tracks. Appears on hover over a mech weapon icon in unit_status. NOT shown for enemies on selection — enemy attack AOE is drawn directly on main board.

terrain_tooltip.description: Bottom-right panel. Shows terrain name + one-line effect on tile hover (empty, ground, forest, mountain, water, etc.). Also shows status effects on units at the hovered tile.

neutral_hover.description: Dead space top-right of the window (blank area above the Bonus Objectives panel). Use as the mouse_move target before click to dismiss any residual tooltip. Avoid (1100, 680) — that spot IS the terrain_tooltip area.

scaling_note: MCP coords ~= Quartz logical screen coords. To adapt to a different window position/size, offset by (current_window.x - reference_window.x, current_window.y - reference_window.y) and scale by (current_window.width / reference_window.width, current_window.height / reference_window.height). See src/capture/detect_grid.grid_from_window for the analogous pattern used by grid_to_mcp.
